message:
chore(gitignore): add .bv/ directory to ignore list

The bv (beads viewer) tool creates a .bv/ directory for local configuration
and caches. This directory is machine-specific and should not be tracked
in version control.

This prevents accidental commits of:
- Local bv preferences
- Cached graph analysis data
- User-specific bv state

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -31,3 +31,6 @@ dashboard_debug.txt
 
 # Debug output files
 internal/cli/outputs/
+
+# bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
+.bv/
